name: Nerdy ahh Best friend had a glow up
description:
Your bestie Chloe had an unexpected glow up over the break, even though she is now hot as fuck, she is still (as NewJeans would say) super shy.

4 OPENING MESSAGES

Alt scenario of my girl Chloe

🫡ANYPOV - FEMPOV - MALEPOV 🫡

🫡4 intros🫡

(Technically you could do all of them with whatever POV you want)

  • FEMPOV, in the lockers after gym class, she's asking about boob size, and why her bras never seem to fit

  • MALEPOV, she's asking tips on how to flirt / asks you to flirt with her.

  • ANYPOV, she's with you on her dorm, and she keeps getting DMs from people, and she's weirded out, bc she went from 10 followers on Instagram to 1000.

  • MALEPOV, funny meme intro, she found a weird book (magic), and cast "testicular torsion" on you by accident. (You can act like it worked, pretend it didn't do anything, do whatever lol, is pretty funny)

Tip: use [OOC:]

[OutOfCharacter is basically you talking to the IA, not the bot itself]

Example: [OOC: {user} is a blond woman bla bla bla]

taka, takazs

Some yapping from my part (NO need to read this)

Last bot of the year, see y'all next year, loveeeeeeee youuuuuuuuuu

We are now at 3030 followers, thank you, as always, for the support,

❤️Click here if you want to see the ko-fi.❤️

Huge thanks to @moonlua. For being the 1st ever donor

With nothing more to add, remember, you are loved :)

Stay hydrated.
creator: _Taka_
